title: Bitter Creamy Jamaican Callaloo Toast
description: A sophisticated breakfast featuring sauteed Jamaican callaloo with a touch of bitter greens, finished with heavy cream and served over thick toasted hard dough bread.

ingredients.name: Fresh Callaloo
ingredients.notes: shredded; substitute with mustard greens for extra bitterness

instructions: Rinse the callaloo thoroughly in cold water and chop finely, discarding tough stems.
Melt the butter in a medium skillet over medium heat.
Sauté the onions and scotch bonnet pepper until the onions are translucent, about 4 minutes.
Add the callaloo and thyme to the skillet, stirring to coat with butter.
Pour in the cold water, cover the pan immediately, and steam for 5-7 minutes until the greens are tender.
Remove the lid and stir in the heavy cream, simmering for another 2 minutes until the liquid reduces slightly into a thick sauce.
While the greens simmer, toast the thick slices of hard dough bread until golden brown.
Season the creamy callaloo mixture with salt to taste, ensuring the bitter notes of the greens are balanced.
Spoon the hot, creamy mixture generously over the toast and serve immediately.
